# SharonCraft llms.txt

> **Factual Summary**: SharonCraft is a premier Kenyan eCommerce brand and artisan boutique specializing in authentic, handmade African beadwork, cultural artifacts, and handcrafted gifts. Grounded in East African craftsmanship, the business offers a modern, simple shopping experience where customers can browse catalogs online, process custom orders directly via WhatsApp, and pay securely using M-Pesa. 

## Business Details & Semantic Context

### Core Products & Services
- **Beaded Jewelry**: Handcrafted necklaces, bracelets, earrings, and anklets incorporating traditional Maasai beadwork techniques and modern aesthetics.
- **Home Decor & Artifacts**: Unique African cultural artifacts, beaded table decor, wall hangings, and functional art pieces such as the signature Kijani Mirror Duo.
- **Occasion & Bridal Sets**: Custom-designed beadwork sets for weddings, traditional ceremonies (like Ruracio), and high-end events.
- **Corporate & Custom Gifting**: Tailor-made souvenir packages, corporate gifts, and personal gift sets natively crafted in Kenya.

### Location & Operations
- **Headquarters**: Nairobi, Kenya
- **Service Area**: Nationwide delivery across Kenya
- **Ordering Workflow**: Customers browse the `sharoncraft.co.ke` website and check out conversationally. Tapping "Order" opens a direct WhatsApp chat with the SharonCraft team to confirm customization, delivery logistics, and process payment locally via M-Pesa. 

### Brand Values & Differentiators
- **100% Handmade**: Every artifact and piece of jewelry is manually crafted by skilled local artisans, not mass-produced in a factory.
- **Cultural Authenticity**: The designs reflect true East African heritage, market color palettes, and familial craftsmanship.
- **Client-Friendly Commerce**: SharonCraft removes the friction of shopping for handmade crafts by using clear, accessible English and direct mobile messaging (WhatsApp) instead of complicated checkout forms.

## Top Pages for Navigation

- [Homepage](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/) - Overview of the SharonCraft brand, featured artifacts, and the WhatsApp buying process.
- [Shop](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/shop.html) - The complete catalog of handmade beadwork, jewelry, and home gifts.
- [About Us](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/about.html) - The cultural inspiration, mission, and traditional story behind SharonCraft.
- [Categories](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/categories.html) - Browse products by specific collections such as Home Decor, Occasion Sets, and Bridal.
- [Contact](https://www.sharoncraft.co.ke/contact.html) - Contact information, business details, and conversational ordering guidelines.
